title: Japanese-Style Sirloin Steak with Khao Pad
description: A decadent and flavorful Japanese-inspired dish featuring a tender sirloin steak served with a sweet and savory khao pad.
instructions: 1. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
2. Season the sirloin steak with salt, black pepper, and sesame oil.
3. Grill the steak for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 130°F for medium-rare.
4. Let the steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
5. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of soy sauce over medium heat.
6. Add the sliced green onions and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until they are softened.
7. Add the grated ginger and cook for an additional minute.
8. Stir in the cooked khao pad rice and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the rice is heated through.
9. In a small bowl, whisk together the remaining 1 tablespoon of soy sauce and 1 teaspoon of brown sugar.
10. Pour the sauce over the khao pad and stir to combine.
11. Serve the sliced sirloin steak with the khao pad and green onions.
